description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: push_github runs in the deploy stage and executes two curl commands piped to bash – first downloading and running init.sh with arguments github HA-Custom_components root /cloudflare, then downloading and running push.sh with argument Europe/Oslo; update_readme runs in the build stage and executes a curl POST request to https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/7064305/trigger/pipeline sending the $README_TOKEN, ref=master, and variables[single_repo]=cloudflare. No custom Docker image or services are specified, so the default runner image is used. Ensure the $README_TOKEN variable is provided as a secret for the pipeline.
